untranslatable_reason: This is an exit/invalidation rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes WHEN to exit (trade thesis wrong), not HOW MUCH to risk or size positions. The max_loss_percent_of_account parameter is a risk limit/stop-loss threshold, not a sizing methodology. Position sizing rules prescribe position quantity based on volatility, Kelly criterion, fixed fractional risk, or similar methods—this rule is a thesis invalidation trigger.
